overallText: All of your results are in the typical range. This is a reassuring set of numbers from a routine check. Your provider can go over anything you would like to talk about at your next visit.

perTest.text: Your blood sugar after fasting is within the typical range.
Your total cholesterol is within the typical range. This is the combined amount of cholesterol in your blood.
Your sodium is within the typical range. Sodium helps balance the fluids in your body.
Your potassium is within the typical range. Potassium helps your heart and muscles work.
Your creatinine is within the typical range, one sign your kidneys are filtering well.
Your calcium is within the typical range. Calcium supports your bones, muscles, and nerves.
Your hemoglobin is within the typical range. Hemoglobin carries oxygen around your body.
Your TSH is within the typical range, one signal that your thyroid is being regulated normally.
